hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "[$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] Prettier formatting: $f" >> ~/.claude/prettier-hook.log; npx prettier --write "$f" >> ~/.claude/prettier-hook.log 2>&1 && echo "  ✓ Success" >> ~/.claude/prettier-hook.log || echo "  ✗ Failed" >> ~/.claude/prettier-hook.log; } || true

hooks.statusMessage: Slack 권한 요청 알림 전송 중...
